title: Risk classifier output (IFRNLLEI01PRD-749 / G2.P1.1)
description: Documents the JSON shape returned by scripts/classify-session-risk.py. The classifier is deterministic (regex patterns + category lookups, no LLM) so this schema is a no-op constraint at runtime — it serves as a contract for downstream consumers (Build Prompt riskSection injection, audit-risk-decisions.sh, session_risk_audit table).

signals.description: Named risk signals: `category:<name>`, `mutation:<verb>`, `read_only_tools_only`, `evidence_missing:<reason>`, etc. Documented in scripts/classify-session-risk.py.

plan_hash.description: Hash of the plan body — used for deterministic prompt-trial bucket assignment.

alert_category.description: Echo of the input category, for audit traceability.
